waivers.reason: Pi skips exfil rules because allowed-host bypass semantics are not implemented.
Pi currently normalizes mapping-shaped injection patterns to an empty list.
Pi uses separate output-secret heuristics and does not load canonical secret patterns.
Pi does not implement Claude context-specific policy relaxation.
Claude has no damage-control Read PreToolUse hook; read confirmation is currently a Pi-only extension.
Content-scan paths only take effect with the deferred mapping-shaped injection patterns.
Exclusions are non-triggering modifiers; per-pattern paired negative controls are not yet generated.
Claude and Pi semantic Git analysis runs before these isolated YAML rules, so the YAML branch is unreachable.
Claude classifies these find commands as read-only before YAML evaluation, so the isolated YAML branches are unreachable.
Claude unwraps node -e before YAML evaluation, removing the node prefix required by this pattern.
These rules are explicitly Linux-only and cannot reach their policy branch in the Windows oracle run.
